arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news before Crystal Palace and PSG as two stars ruled out amid Saka update
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has issued injury updates on three players before games against Crystal Palace and Paris Saint-Germain at Emirates Stadium in the next eight days. As such, Arsenal have an extra 48 hours on PSG to prepare for the huge Champions League semi-final.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans launch tongue-in-cheek 'Visit Tottenham' campaign in protest of the club's controversial Rwanda partnership
arts.sum: A group of Arsenal supporters have opted for a satirical approach in their campaign against the club's sponsorship deal with Visit Rwanda.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Arteta receives Bukayo Saka transfer warning as Real Madrid circle
arts.sum: However, Hargreaves believes that Saka could be tempted to join Real Madrid in his mid-twenties if he helps Arsenal win several pieces of silverware over the next few years. Arsenal superstar Bukayo Saka has been tipped to join Real Madrid by former Manchester United midfielder Owen Hargreaves.

arts.ttl: “They could end up paying €140m” – Real Madrid backed to sign Arsenal superstar
arts.sum: It is becoming increasingly clear within Real Madrid that significant change is likely to be made in the coming years. It has been a desperately disappointing season so far for the reigning La Liga and European champions, and they may look to the transfer market in their efforts to turn around their fortunes. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique downplays Arsenal's threats in Liverpool comparison ahead of European clash
arts.sum: Luis Enrique has confidently dismissed worries about Arsenal's prowess from set-pieces, indicating that his Paris Saint-Germain team will approach the upcoming clash at the Emirates with a standard game plan. The French titans have already seen off two English sides in the knockout stages of the competition, having eliminated Aston Villa and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line-ups vs Crystal Palace as Butler-Oyedeji in, Saka and Saliba rested
arts.sum: Canton's Arsenal XI vs Crystal Palace: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Rice, Merino, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Trossard, Martinelli. For Arsenal, they need to be best prepared and most-rested for next week, but considering they do not have a game on the weekend, it makes sense to prioritise preparation, helped further by the dynamic that both teams have such key games coming up next.

arts.ttl: Leicester City considering ex-Arsenal midfielder as possible Ruud van Nistelrooy replacement?
arts.sum: Leicester City are reportedly considering a swoop for former Arsenal and Barcelona midfielder Cesc Fabregas to replace head coach Ruud van Nistelrooy.
